arts.ttl: "Inter have something special" - Pep Guardiola talks up Man City's Champions League opponents
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola explains why Inter Milan "have something special" ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man City have two managers battling over the same player as Pep Guardiola conversations revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City play Inter Milan on Wednesday in a double header - in the Champions League at the Etihad Stadium and in the UEFA Youth League over the road at the Joie Stadium.

arts.ttl: Rodri speaks out on player workload and Champions League clash with Inter
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has voiced concerns about the demanding football calendar and hinted at the possibility of player strikes in the future. The Spanish international, who scored the winning goal in last year’s Champions League final against Inter Milan, shared his thoughts ahead of City’s rematch with the Italian side. On the issue of player workload, Rodri stated, “I don’t know the exact number of games that would be right in a season, but over 50 is too many, and 60-70 is unsustainable. It’s not just about business, but the quality of the spectacle offered.” He added, “Someone needs The post Rodri speaks out on player workload and Champions League clash with Inter appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland could smash remarkable Cristiano Ronaldo record in Man City's Champions League tie against Inter Milan following explosive start to the season
arts.sum: Erling Haaland (left) has just one match remaining to break one of Cristiano Ronaldo's (inset) incredible goalscoring records that the Portuguese superstar previously set playing for Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Manchester City v Inter: Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to begin their 2024-25 Champions League campaign with a highly anticipated match against Serie A champions Inter Milan at the Etihad Stadium on Wednesday night. This encounter marks the first meeting between the two sides since their dramatic 2023 Champions League final, where City secured a narrow 1-0 victory to complete a historic treble. Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City enter the match in formidable form, boasting a perfect record in the Premier League after four matches. arts.ttl: Rodri says players 'close' to striking due to increasing fixture demands
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has suggested players could strike over increasing fixture congestion.

arts.ttl: Rodri sends strike warning as Alisson slams expanded Champions League
arts.sum: Rodri has warned that footballers are ‘close’ to going on strike after Alisson Becker criticised the new Champions League format. Uefa has added two more games to the ‘league phase; of the competition, with clubs facing eight matches before the knockout stage. A new playoff round has also been added to the tournament.
